nodes.title: 内容
widgets_values: tyle: realistic - cinematic - The girl is walking along a path lined with blooming cherry blossom trees and vibrant tulips, her long dark hair flowing gently in the breeze as she moves forward with a bright smile.  She looks directly ahead, speaking in a clear, cheerful voice, “今天天气好晴朗” Her voice carries a light, pleasant tone that matches the sunny atmosphere.  The soft rustling of leaves and the faint hum of distant birds blend with the gentle swaying of flowers around her, creating a peaceful springtime ambiance.

nodes.title: 开=文生视频。关=图生视频

widgets_values:
核心作用——
原理：它基于 Enhance-A-Video 算法，通过调整 LTXV 模型的时间注意力机制，来优化视频生成效果：
1、提升帧间一致性，减少画面闪烁、变形
2、增强细节表现，让生成的视频更清晰、真实
可控制增强强度，通过 weight 参数调节效果强弱
副作用——
1、会明显增加总生成时间。weight = 4.000 时，增加的时间通常在 15%~40%
2、请问增加显存

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
